prestazioni: Replacement of the original Renault RS3C V10 (3.5L, 750 hp @ 14,300 RPM) with a bespoke **Pipo Moteurs RS4C** 3.5L V10, stroked to 3.8L and fitted with **Mahle Motorsport** forged pistons (12.5:1 CR), **Carrillo** H-beam connecting rods, and a **Cosworth** billet crankshaft for 850 hp @ 15,000 RPM with a 16,000 RPM redline, paired with **Xtrac P1044** 7-speed semi-automatic transmission featuring **AP Racing** carbon-carbon clutch and **Quaife** ATB differential

Installation of a **Bosch MS3.1** engine management system with **Motec PDM15** power distribution module, **NGK** Iridium IX racing spark plugs (gap set to 0.018"), and **Pectel SQ6M** data acquisition system for real-time telemetry, including **Kistler** 4075A200 pressure sensors in each cylinder for individual cylinder tuning

Chassis reinforcement via **T45 aerospace-grade steel** subframe triangulation (designed by **Williams Advanced Engineering**) and **Brembo** HTC 64T carbon-ceramic brake system (380mm front, 355mm rear) with **Hawk Performance** HT-12 brake pads, paired with **Ohlins TTX40** 3-way adjustable dampers and **Eibach** 900 lb/in front / 700 lb/in rear springs for 3.5G lateral load capacity
estetica: Replica of the **1992 Spanish GP-winning livery** with **3M Scotchcal** vinyl wrap in **RAL 5017** (Traffic Blue) and **RAL 1021** (Rape Yellow), including **Camel** and **Canon** decals printed on **Oracal 970RA** high-gloss film with **Avery Dennison** overlaminate for UV protection

Custom **Williams Advanced Engineering** carbon-fiber front splitter with **Gurney flap** (30mm chord) and **rear diffuser** featuring **Vortex Generators** (VG) in a **3x2 staggered array** (each VG 15mm tall, 5mm thick), both manufactured via **autoclave curing** at **120°C and 6 bar pressure** for optimal resin distribution

Replacement of the original **OMP** 6-point harness with a **Schroth Racing** Profi II 75mm 6-point harness (FIA 8853/2016 homologated) and installation of a **Sparco Evo XI** carbon-fiber seat with **Alcantara** suede upholstery (custom-stitched **Williams F1** logo in **Pantone 116 C**), paired with a **MOMO Mod.77** quick-release steering wheel wrapped in **Nappa leather** with **embroidered Renault Sport logo**
